pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing class version mismatches if the target runtime is Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a snapshot compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the maven-compiler-plugin may not support compiling for Java 21 release levels, leading to build failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin release configuration to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The release flag controls the bytecode version and API availability; keeping it at 11 prevents the use of Java 21 APIs and features.
